basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani has released the official notification for Institute Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation is allowed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PH/OBC/Women candidates.
age_limit.details: Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation is allowed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PH/OBC/Women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry (with at least 60% marks) Or M.Pharm. (with at least 60 % marks)
qualification.details: Institute Research Fellow: Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry (with at least 60% marks) Or M.Pharm. (with at least 60 % marks). Experience in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Peptide Chemistry Related Project Work will be given preference. Preference will also be given to candidates qualified with National Eligibility Tests-CSIR-UGC NET including PhD only / PhD + lectureship (Assistant Professorship) in Chemical Sciences / GATE in Chemistry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 04-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Institute Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry or an M.Pharm degree, both with at least 60% marks. Specific experience and national test qualifications are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 35 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/PH/OBC/Women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is allowed up to 5 years for candidates belonging to SC, ST, PH, OBC, and women categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their application and curriculum vitae via email to the specified email addresses before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Institute Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online interview for candidates who are shortlisted based on their applications.

faq.question: Q8. Does BITS Pilani offer any preference for candidates with specific qualifications or experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Peptide Chemistry and those qualified with CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, or holding a PhD.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the BITS Pilani Goa Campus located?
faq.answer: The BITS Pilani Goa Campus is located in Goa, with the pincode 403726.
